  and multimedia when useful to aiding comprehension.

lcs.text:
Use common, grade-appropriate Greek or

  bellicose, rebel).

lcs.text:
Consult general and specialized reference
  materials (e.g., dictionaries, glossaries, thesauruses), both print and
  digital, to find the pronunciation of a word or determine or clarify its
  precise meaning or its part of speech.

lcs.text:

  the meaning of a word or phrase (e.g., by checking the inferred meaning in
  context or in a dictionary).

lcs.text:
Acquire and use accurately
  grade-appropriate general academic and domain-specific words and phrases;
  gather vocabulary knowledge when considering a word or phrase important to
  comprehension or expression.
